compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing structural boundary test for preplanning preconditions entry/exit gate
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Write a structural boundary test for the preplanning SKILL.md that fails before T4 adds the validator hooks.

## Test Approach (Given / When / Then)
Test: test_preplanning_skill_has_preconditions_entry_gate
  Given: The current preplanning/SKILL.md file
  When: We check for the required structural section heading "### Preconditions Entry Gate" or equivalent
  Then: The heading exists in the file (structural boundary — per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5)

Test: test_preplanning_skill_references_preconditions_validator
  Given: The current preplanning/SKILL.md file
  When: We check for a reference to preconditions-validator.sh in the skill file
  Then: The reference exists (boundary test for the wiring)

Test: test_preplanning_skill_has_preconditions_exit_emit
  Given: The current preplanning/SKILL.md file
  When: We check for the required structural section heading "### Preconditions Exit Emit" or equivalent
  Then: The heading exists

These tests FAIL now (before T4) because the preplanning SKILL.md does not yet have these sections.

## Implementation Notes
- Test file: tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-gate.sh
- Pattern: follow tests/skills/test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh structure
- Use grep -q or Python section-extraction (not execution of SKILL.md)
- Source tests/lib/assert.sh for assertion helpers
- Per Rule 5: these are structural boundary tests for a non-executable LLM instruction file
  (SKILL.md is not a script; we test its structural boundaries, not its runtime behavior)
- Add .test-index RED marker before committing

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-gate.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (add RED marker for plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md mapping to this test)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-gate.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-gate.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_preplanning_skill_has_preconditions_entry_gate and test_preplanning_skill_has_preconditions_exit_emit and test_preplanning_skill_references_preconditions_validator
  Verify: grep -c 'test_preplanning_skill_has_preconditions_entry_gate\|test_preplanning_skill_has_preconditions_exit_emit\|test_preplanning_skill_references_preconditions_validator' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-gate.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] Tests FAIL before T4 (preplanning SKILL.md does not yet have these sections)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-gate.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] Tests use structural boundary approach (grep/section-extraction, not source-file execution)
  Verify: grep -v '#' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-gate.sh | grep -c 'bash\|source.*SKILL\|eval' | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_preplanning_skill_has_preconditions_entry_gate] for plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep 'preplanning/SKILL.md.*\[test_preplanning_skill_has_preconditions_entry_gate\]\|test_preplanning_skill_has_preconditions_entry_gate.*preplanning/SKILL' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) after staging only this task (tests fail but test gate handles RED markers)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
